widgets_values:
Reference sheet: A clean black-background character sheet showing the same 30-year-old adult woman from consistent front, three-quarter, side, and close-up views, with natural skin texture, shoulder-length dark hair, and a charcoal jacket.

Generated video: The same 30-year-old adult woman walks through a softly lit studio, pauses, and turns toward the camera while keeping her identity and wardrobe consistent. The camera tracks beside her, then makes a slow dolly-in. She says, "Let's begin." Soft footsteps, cloth movement, room tone, and quiet ambient audio are audible.
blurry, distorted face, deformed hands, duplicate person, text, watermark, low quality

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Create a clean photorealistic character reference sheet of the same 30-year-old adult woman shown in image 1 and image 2. Use a black background with no text. Arrange consistent full-body front, three-quarter, side, and close-up face views in separate uncluttered panels. Preserve her identity, facial structure, hair, skin tone, and charcoal jacket.
